narrative_text: A bright red crab dances happily on top of a smooth gray rock. Beside the rock, a shiny pink seashell rests in the warm sand, waiting to be found.
branch_summary: Tell the story of a dancing crab who finds a magical seashell on the beach!

error_exclusions.reason: Only one crab, no weight or temperature implied visually.
Static object, no action or temperature.
Static object, resting on the beach.

sprite_code.bg: for(var y=0;y<130;y++) for(var x=0;x<PW;x++){ var g=y/130; px(x,y, Math.floor(100+g*70), Math.floor(180+g*40), Math.floor(240+g*10), 'sky'); } for(var y=130;y<160;y++) for(var x=0;x<PW;x++){ var g=(y-130)/30; px(x,y, Math.floor(30+g*20), Math.floor(120+g*30), Math.floor(180+g*40), 'ocean'); } for(var x=0;x<PW;x+=15) px(x+(Math.random()*5), 135+(Math.random()*20), 200, 230, 255, 'ocean.waves'); for(var y=160;y<PH;y++) for(var x=0;x<PW;x++){ var n=Math.sin(x*0.075+y*0.125)*4+Math.random()*6; var s=Math.floor(210+n); px(x,y, Math.floor(s*0.95), Math.floor(s*0.85), Math.floor(s*0.6), 'ground'); }
sprite_code.rock_01: const eid = 'rock_01'; const cx = 250, cy = 260; var rx = 40, ry = 20; ellip(cx, cy+4, rx+4, ry, 70,68,65, eid+'.shadow'); ellip(cx, cy, rx, ry, 100,98,95, eid+'.base'); ellip(cx, cy-4, rx-4, ry-4, 118,115,110, eid+'.layer_mid'); ellip(cx, cy-8, rx-10, ry-6, 140,138,135, eid+'.layer_top'); for(var i=0;i<rx;i+=10) px(cx-rx/2+i, cy-2, 80,78,75, eid+'.crack_1'); for(var i=0;i<rx;i+=12) px(cx-rx/2+i, cy-6, 80,78,75, eid+'.crack_2'); for(var i=0;i<8;i++) px(cx-rx+10+i*5, cy-ry+4, 180,175,160, eid+'.highlight_dots'); px(cx+15, cy, 60,110,50, eid+'.moss');
sprite_code.crab_01: const eid = 'crab_01'; const cx = 250, cy = 228; ellip(cx, cy, 20, 10, 180,40,30, eid+'.body_dark'); ellip(cx, cy, 16, 8, 210,60,45, eid+'.body_mid'); ellip(cx, cy-2, 10, 4, 240,90,65, eid+'.body_highlight'); rect(cx-8, cy-14, 2, 6, 180,40,30, eid+'.head.eyestalk.left'); rect(cx+6, cy-14, 2, 6, 180,40,30, eid+'.head.eyestalk.right'); circ(cx-8, cy-16, 4, 20,20,20, eid+'.head.eyes.left'); circ(cx+8, cy-16, 4, 20,20,20, eid+'.head.eyes.right'); px(cx-8, cy-18, 255,255,255, eid+'.head.eyes.left'); px(cx+6, cy-18, 255,255,255, eid+'.head.eyes.right'); ellip(cx-26, cy-4, 6, 4, 200,50,38, eid+'.claws.left.arm'); ellip(cx-34, cy-6, 6, 4, 220,70,50, eid+'.claws.left.base'); tri(cx-38, cy-10, cx-34, cy-6, cx-30, cy-10, 220,70,50, eid+'.claws.left.pincer_top'); tri(cx-38, cy-2, cx-34, cy-6, cx-30, cy-2, 210,60,45, eid+'.claws.left.pincer_bot'); ellip(cx+26, cy-4, 6, 4, 200,50,38, eid+'.claws.right.arm'); ellip(cx+34, cy-6, 6, 4, 220,70,50, eid+'.claws.right.base'); tri(cx+30, cy-10, cx+34, cy-6, cx+38, cy-10, 220,70,50, eid+'.claws.right.pincer_top'); tri(cx+30, cy-2, cx+34, cy-6, cx+38, cy-2, 210,60,45, eid+'.claws.right.pincer_bot'); line(cx-14, cy+6, cx-24, cy+14, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.left_1'); line(cx-12, cy+8, cx-20, cy+18, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.left_2'); line(cx-10, cy+10, cx-16, cy+20, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.left_3'); line(cx+14, cy+6, cx+24, cy+14, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.right_1'); line(cx+12, cy+8, cx+20, cy+18, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.right_2'); line(cx+10, cy+10, cx+16, cy+20, 175,40,28, eid+'.legs.right_3'); line(cx-26, cy-16, cx-22, cy-20, 100,100,100, eid+'.action_lines'); line(cx+26, cy-16, cx+22, cy-20, 100,100,100, eid+'.action_lines');
sprite_code.shell_01: const eid = 'shell_01'; const cx = 160, cy = 280; ellip(cx+2, cy+2, 14, 6, 170,140,100, eid+'.shadow'); ellip(cx, cy, 12, 10, 220,100,140, eid+'.base'); ellip(cx-2, cy-2, 10, 8, 240,130,170, eid+'.layer_mid'); ellip(cx-4, cy-4, 6, 6, 255,180,210, eid+'.layer_top'); ellip(cx+8, cy+2, 6, 4, 180,70,100, eid+'.opening_outer'); ellip(cx+8, cy+2, 4, 2, 120,40,60, eid+'.opening_inner'); for(var i=-6;i<=6;i+=3) arc(cx, cy, 10, 1.5, 4.5, 200,80,120, eid+'.ridges'); px(cx-6, cy-6, 255,255,255, eid+'.sparkle');
